data.body: Refined via design brainstorm 2026-06-17. Scope narrowed to a lossy NDJSON interop projection (reporting/data-mining, primary) + clean rebar-to-rebar migration (secondary). Backup dropped (git bundle of the tickets branch already covers it). MCP export/import tools dropped (CLI/library only). Added: provider-neutral --strip-external seam, provenance fields (source_id/source_created_at/source_author/source_env), idempotent skip by source_id, STATUS reproduction of non-open states. Performance: streaming export via reduce_ticket + deferred-push import (REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=off); batch-commit primitive deferred to a follow-up task. GitHub Issues sync filed as a separate follow-on epic (rides the reconciler, not import).
